name: TheDrummer RP Starter Variants
description: Three copyable sampler variants for SillyTavern roleplay. Start with Balanced, switch by scene need.

balanced.notes: Default campaign play. Good balance of texture, control, and forward motion.

cinematic.notes: Atmospheric scenes, major reveals, emotional confrontations. Watch for overlong prose.

tight.notes: Investigation, combat, dialogue-heavy turns, or when model starts rambling.
